pattern: Tally occurrences, find the largest count, then sum the counts of every value that reaches that peak.
hints: Build a frequency table of the values first.
The maximum frequency is the largest entry in that table.
Add together every frequency that equals the maximum; that total is the answer, not just the number of such values.

edge_inputs.description: two values tie for the top
all distinct, every value ties at frequency one
one clear winner outranks the rest
all identical, single value owns the peak
two pairs tie above the singletons

stress.description: random small array within the stated bounds
narrow value range to force frequent ties
